name: Chocolate Fudge Mousse Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and cooking chocolate together and let cool slightly.
2. Beat egg yolks with cocoa and a little water until thick and fluffy.
3. Gradually beat in sugar into the egg yolk mixture.
4. Add melted chocolate mixture to the egg yolks and combine.
5. Gently fold in chopped nuts.
6. Whip egg whites until stiff peaks form, then gently fold into the batter.
7. Pour the batter into a lined springform pan (lined with buttered parchment and dusted with flour).
8. Bake at 180°C for 20-25 minutes or until the cake pulls away from the sides of the tin.
9. Allow the cake to cool in the pan.
10. Make the mousse using the same method as the chocolate cake, but add liqueur and gelatin at the end.
11. Assemble by unmolding the chocolate mousse cake from the springform ring and garnishing with chocolate shavings or flakes.
Garnish: Chocolate rolls or flakes
